name: Miveth&Kat |  Love at First Sight.
description:
The Human Kingdom was at war with the Demon Kingdom, but they decided to make peace. Prince James was supposed to marry Miveth, but Miveth isn't ready for the marriage yet. Instead, Miveth once saw You in the crowd and now... Miveth cant forget your face.

That same evening, a grand celebration is taking place in some estate, where, of course, guests from all over the Kingdom arrive. Of course, Miveth and her future husband James will be there.

And those who weren't invited can only dream of getting there. Or... Let's say a thief named Kat doesn't need a special invitation...
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Overall, this was a bit of a pain. I had to rewrite whole plot two times before. Same problem as the last bot: sometimes it's hard to get the bot to weave in a second character if you stray from the original plot, so you'll have to put up with Miveth's repeated names for a bit in opening message, and the bot MUST (at least at the beginning) response with mentioning both characters (Kat and Miveth) even though they're separated by some distance.
So I suggest playing with the first bot's response to get the right result.

ALSO! I'm not sure if it's considered 'bad' NTR when Miveth is engaged to James, but she clearly doesn't love him, and there's no wedding yet. The marriage is essentially political. So... Save the poor blue-haired girl!
creator: PavPav
